description_long: This is a modern, deep blue velvet sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a low profile. The seat and backrest are both generously padded and feature a uniform grid of deep tufting, giving the surface a plush, quilted appearance. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, creating a cohesive and enclosed seating area. The sofa sits on a recessed, low-profile wooden base that is only slightly visible, giving the impression that the sofa almost floats above the ground. The upholstery is smooth and luxurious, with a subtle sheen that enhances the rich color. This piece exudes a contemporary, upscale vibe suitable for urban lounges, lobbies, or stylish public spaces.
description: A deep blue, velvet-upholstered sofa with a boxy, tufted design and straight, high armrests, set on a recessed wooden base. The surface is plush and quilted, giving it a luxurious, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep tufting on both seat and backrest, and the straight, high armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat, with tufting visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back panel and the subtle wooden base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the straight armrest and the plush, tufted seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and three attached back cushions, all deeply tufted in a grid pattern for a cohesive, plush look.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and fully padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not individually visible; the sofa sits on a recessed, continuous wooden base that is only slightly exposed, giving a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest with deep grid tufting, matching the seat cushions in both height and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark blue velvet with a uniform, deep tufted grid pattern across both seat and backrest, creating a quilted, textured surface.
